title: Optimized Portfolio & Rationale (Oct 2025)

Rationale: High conviction in quality, growth, lower beta, and diversification. Chips consolidated to best names (NVDA, AVGO), all high-correlation industrial REITs retired, replaced with LII/FTAI. Utilities diversified by replacing cluster with JXI. Top Sharpe, scenario, and news-confirmed winners sized up. Most speculative/volatile/tail-risk tickers removed for risk-adjusted return, scenario resilience, and correlation reduction.
